title: Unique Dark - Mekanism Support
description: Support for mekanism in Unique Dark
body:
This texture pack is an addon for [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark) by [amongstreality](https://modrinth.com/user/amongstreality) make sure to check it out!

The texture pack is only available on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/unique-dark-mekanism) And [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unique-dark-mekanism). Do not download from any other sites!
### Supported Mods:

[Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)

[Mekanism: Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-generators)

[Mekanism: Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-tools)
<details>
<summary>Terms of use</summary>
Author: CrimsonFlames

**When you can use my asset:**

In modpacks on curseforge, modrinth

Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

Making a youtube video on it

**When you cannot use:**

Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace

Locking behind a paywall

Distribution of original assets on any platforms.

**Links:**

- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-mekanism)

- [Curseforge]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/gui-revision-plus](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unique-dark-mekanism))
</details>
